recommendations.title: Upgrade backhaul on Tower B
recommendations.desc: Backhaul utilization consistently above 80% during peak. Upgrade to 10Gbps to reduce slow-internet complaints by ~22%.

recommendations.title: Deploy Cell on Wheels at Site 14
recommendations.desc: Rural cluster reports repeated no-signal events during storms. Temporary CoW will improve coverage until permanent site is commissioned.

recommendations.title: Optimize handover parameters in Metro cluster
recommendations.desc: Handover failures driving 31% of call drops. Tuning neighbor lists and hysteresis can recover ~14% drop rate.

recommendations.title: Enable AMR-WB codec on legacy MSC
recommendations.desc: Voice distortion complaints concentrated on 3G BSNL leg. Codec upgrade resolves distortion without hardware change.

recommendations.title: Schedule preventive DG maintenance
recommendations.desc: Three critical outages in 30 days traced to DG failure. Preventive maintenance reduces MTTR by ~40%.
